title: RGB Animated sword
description: a texture pack that adds an animated texture to the diamond sword
body:
# Animated RGB Sword Texture Pack *** ![Donations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a0051d07be1974f2c280cc8a8401a9d1394bcaa.png) it would help me out alot if you could support my work by donating, and i really apreciate it if you do end up donating no matter how small or big, thank you!, also i made a cool button😁 [☕**Fill My Coffee Cup**](https://buymeacoffee.com/eastpenguin) *** ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cfc45c4991fced6cd366fcf07441b07c4127140c.png)
Terms of use - do not plagiarise this pack. - (optional)if you are making a socail media post eg. youtube video please leave original download link. - do not give alternitive download links. - feel free to edit the pack aslong as its for personal use and dont reupload it on this or any other site. other then these rules this pack is licensed under **All Rights Reserved**
I really hope you enjoy, and thank you for downloading😁 *** ## Texture ![Animated sword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/560962de6a48a1463e6aaa77a5c676658f90a163.gif) *** ## Versions 1.16 - 1.21 *** Made by- ![East Penguin](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/758670a6eee566f4f555032f7b2102b2e43156b0.png)
